docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-02-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-02-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-02-2012 - JUDGMENT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY CALEIGH HABER IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO NOV-02-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P.NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2012 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-27-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ARE REQUIRED TO APPEAR AT THE NEXT HEARING TO EXPLAIN STATUS OF THE CASE. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: RICHARD GROTCH. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIMA, DYLAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HABER, CALEIGH $3,257.06 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,432.06, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF THE DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN JANUARY 4, 2013, RETURN TO PLAINTIFF THE DIAMOND ENGAGEMENT RING THAT IS THE SUBJECT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
